mapper.insert: insert ignore into pay_refund_task(order_id, refund_type, message, status, retry_count, next_retry_time) values (#{orderId}, #{refundType}, #{message}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, now())
mapper.update: update pay_refund_task set status = 'PROCESSING', update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and ( status in ('PENDING', 'RETRY') and (next_retry_time is null or next_retry_time <= now()) or (status = 'PROCESSING' and update_time < date_sub(now(), interval 5 minute)) )
update pay_refund_task set status = 'SUCCESS', error_info = null, update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId}

update pay_refund_task set status = 'RETRY', retry_count = retry_count + 1, error_info = #{errorInfo}, next_retry_time = date_add(now(), interval least(retry_count + 1, 10) minute), update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId}
update pay_refund_task set status = 'FAILED', error_info = #{errorInfo}, update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: select id, order_id, refund_type, message, status, retry_count, error_info, next_retry_time, create_time, update_time from pay_refund_task where ( status in ('PENDING', 'RETRY') and (next_retry_time is null or next_retry_time <= now()) or (status = 'PROCESSING' and update_time < date_sub(now(), interval 5 minute)) ) order by id asc limit #{pageSize}
